file_insights.primary_modification: Update TestRunResult interface with consoleErrors and networkRequests

file_insights.purpose: Track auto-claude session state and progress

patterns_discovered: Error detection via page.on('console') and page.on('response') event listeners
Capturing network failures with HTTP status >= 400
Storing console errors as string[] and network requests as NetworkRequest[] interface
gotchas_discovered: Existing test runner (runner.ts) skips page.on() event listeners
Test results were previously passing incorrectly for non-existent routes
Need to attach error listeners before test code execution
recommendations: Implement comprehensive error detection in test runners
Always capture and report console and network errors
Use TypeScript interfaces to standardize error tracking
Add error listeners before test code execution
Include captured errors in test results, even for passing tests
